chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1419 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 10.12.2025 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Safdar Kamal, Advocate for Respondents/NADRA Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the petitioner will file proper petition for the required relief(s), which is not opposed by other side. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
